fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: The Client ID of your Snapchat developer application

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: The Client Secret of your Snapchat developer application

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: Refresh Token to renew the expired Access Token

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Snapchat Marketing.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Data before this date will not be replicated.

custom_description: Connector for the Snapchat Marketing API (Ads API). Provides access to Snapchat advertising entities including organizations, ad accounts, campaigns, ad squads, ads, creatives, media, and audience segments. Supports OAuth2 authentication with automatic token refresh.
supported_questions:
- List all organizations I belong to
- Show me all ad accounts for my organization
- List all campaigns in my ad account
- Show me the ad squads for my ad account
- List all ads in my ad account
- Show me the creatives for my ad account
- List all media files in my ad account
- Show me the audience segments in my ad account
- Which campaigns are currently active?
- What ad squads have the highest daily budget?
- Show me ads that are pending review
- Find campaigns created in the last month
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new campaign
- Update an ad's status
- Delete a creative
- Show me ad performance statistics

first_operation.description: Returns the organizations the authenticated user belongs to

organizations.description: Returns the organizations the authenticated user belongs to
Get a single organization by ID

adaccounts.description: Returns ad accounts belonging to an organization
Get a single ad account by ID

campaigns.description: Returns campaigns belonging to an ad account
Get a single campaign by ID

adsquads.description: Returns ad squads belonging to an ad account
Get a single ad squad by ID

ads.description: Returns ads belonging to an ad account
Get a single ad by ID

creatives.description: Returns creatives belonging to an ad account
Get a single creative by ID

media.description: Returns media belonging to an ad account
Get a single media item by ID

segments.description: Returns audience segments belonging to an ad account
Get a single audience segment by ID

fields.name: contact_phone_optin
fields.description: Whether the contact opted in for phone communications

fields.name: createdByCaller
fields.description: Whether the organization was created by the caller

fields.name: my_display_name
fields.description: Display name of the authenticated user in the organization

fields.name: my_invited_email
fields.description: Email used to invite the authenticated user

fields.name: my_member_id
fields.description: Member ID of the authenticated user

fields.name: roles
fields.description: Roles of the authenticated user in this organization

fields.name: agency_representing_client
fields.description: Whether the account is managed by an agency

fields.name: client_paying_invoices
fields.description: Whether the client pays invoices directly

fields.name: brand_name
fields.description: Brand name displayed in the creative

fields.name: duration_in_seconds
fields.description: Duration in seconds for video media

fields.name: approximate_number_users
fields.description: Approximate number of users in the segment
